#!/usr/bin/env bash /usr/bin/mariadb --user=root --password="$MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD" <<-EOSQL CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS testing; EOSQL if [ -n "$MYSQL_USER" ]; then /usr/bin/mariadb --user=root --password="$MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD" <<-EOSQL GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON \`testing%\`.* TO '$MYSQL_USER'@'%'; EOSQL fi
